justification: 0 Critical findings (pass). However, 1 Important finding ('Vehicle class comparison is case-sensitive') is an invented risk — the scenario states inputs are pre-validated, so assuming casing mismatches from 'different sources' is speculating beyond the given contract. Verdict is SHIP (pass). Confidence >= 75 (pass). The Important finding prevents a full pass but is at least arguable, fitting the partial criteria of '0 Critical but 1 Important finding that is at least arguable' and '1 minor invented risk'.

observations.text: Correct SHIP verdict with no critical findings
High confidence level (95) with well-reasoned confidence areas
Did not flag absence of logging or tests as findings
Deployment risk assessment is accurate — pure function, trivial rollback
Elevated a case-sensitivity concern to Important when inputs are stated to be pre-validated — this is an invented risk that should have stayed at Suggestion level at most
Assumptions list includes 'Database layer enforces consistent casing for vehicleClass' which contradicts the Important finding — Kobe simultaneously assumes normalization and flags its absence
